description: Echinacea purpurea is commonly selected for short seasonal support windows when buyers want species-labeled herbal products.
dosage: Use short labeled serving windows and avoid indefinite high-frequency use unless directed by a clinician.
duration: Most routines are short and situational rather than year-round continuous use.
preparation: Tea, tincture, and capsule formats are common; species-specific labeling should drive comparisons.
